sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 49g of fat. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.
sections.subtitleText: 49g of fat. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 10.7g of carbs. starch is doing most of the heavy lifting here. for a seed, you want real nutrient concentration, not just tiny-food hype.
sections.subtitleText: 10.7g of carbs. starch is doing most of the heavy lifting here. for a seed, you want real nutrient concentration, not just tiny-food hype.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 30.2g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: often brings dense micronutrient support. that is part of what makes the category interesting. usually brings decent fat support. that is one of the category strengths. easy to sprinkle into meals. that practical versatility matters.
